title: regelia coriacea
intro: Regelia coriacea, also known as Green Mallee or Drummond's Mallee, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Regelia coriacea include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Regelia coriacea is often used as a tincture or infusion, and can also be dried and used in teas, capsules, or topical creams, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
